description_long: This is a standard 330 ml Coca-Cola can, featuring a cylindrical aluminum body with a vibrant red background and the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around the sides. The can has a glossy metallic finish, with a silver pull-tab on top for opening. Nutritional information, barcodes, and recycling symbols are printed in white and black on the rear side. The can's surface is smooth and hard, reflecting light due to its polished aluminum exterior. The top is slightly concave with a raised rim, and the bottom is flat for stability. The object is lightweight and designed to contain a carbonated beverage under pressure.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, silver top, and detailed labeling. The surface is smooth, hard, and reflective.
description_view_0: Rear view showing nutritional information, barcode, and recycling symbols on a red background.
description_view_1: Front view dominated by the large white Coca-Cola script logo on a shiny red surface.
description_view_2: Angled view with the Coca-Cola logo and a partial view of a small label and top rim.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the edge of the logo and part of the nutritional label.
attribute_brand_logo: Coca-Cola script logo in white, prominently displayed on the front and sides of the can against a red background.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients panel visible on the rear side of the can, including values for sugar, calories, and sodium.
